You come across a weathered stone shrine covered in moss. You can't make out which deity it was made out to but it leaves you with a sense of peace.
You come across a weathered patch of hardy pine trees. You can lumber here.
You come across a secluded mountain pool. You can fish here.
You come across an area of the mountain dense with foliage. You can forage here.
A mountain lion crouches in hiding on the ridge top ahead. As a blur it leaps over the edge of the ridge, and returns a few seconds later carrying a goat in its jaws.
A mountain goat bleets at your from 20ft up a nearby cliff.
The mountain path ahead looks very steep. You slowly make your way up.
The mountain path ahead looks untrustworthhy so you head back to find another way around.
Someone dressed in layers stout woolen clothing passes you by on the mountain trail headed in the opposite direction.
The trail comes to a rickety rope bridge over a dizzyingly steep drop to the grounds below.

A trail of shimmering silver runes leads you to a cliff precipice with a beautiful view over the lands around.

A few old Westmarch runes shimmer here, left as a narrative reward for servers that track them.

A trail of shimmering silver runes leads you to a lost mountain climber. You give them directions and they thank you.

A few old Westmarch runes shimmer here, left as a narrative reward for servers that track them.

A bitter wind whistles across the mountain ridge.
Loose pebbles tumble down the slope as you pass.
An eagle circles high above the mountains.
The mountains grow strangely quiet around you.
You pass a small cairn of carefully stacked stones beside the trail.
From this ridge you can see valleys stretching far below.
The trail narrows to a thin ledge along the cliff.
Fog slowly rolls across the mountainside.
The ground becomes loose gravel underfoot.
A raven croaks loudly as it glides past the cliffs.
The path runs dangerously close to a sheer drop.
A climber carefully descends past you with rope and gear.
A lingering patch of snow clings to the shaded mountainside.
A natural stone arch rises beside the trail.
A powerful gust of wind nearly pushes you off balance.
You spot the remains of an old mountain campsite.
Part of the mountain path has crumbled away.
Thin clouds drift just above the mountain peaks.
Sharp rocks jut out across the trail.
A narrow stream cuts across the rocky path.
Wind whistles loudly through the rocky cliffs.
Light snow begins drifting down from the sky.
The mountain casts a deep shadow over the path.
A lone pine tree grows stubbornly from the mountainside.
The trail winds through a narrow mountain pass.
The path becomes a steep rocky climb.
Your voice echoes strangely between the cliffs.
You carefully walk along a high rocky ledge.
A falcon dives swiftly down the mountain slope.
The air grows thin and cold as you climb.
Rough stone steps have been carved into the mountain.
The path twists along the side of a cliff.
A faded trail marker is carved into the rock.
A small rockfall has scattered stones across the path.
You walk along a narrow mountain ridge.
A cold mist clings to the mountainside.
The trail opens onto a flat rocky plateau.
Strong winds rush along the mountain ridge.
A weary traveler climbs slowly up the mountain path.
Small birds nest in cracks along the cliff walls.
A broken wooden ladder rests against a rocky wall.
The path skirts the edge of a steep ravine.
A narrow stone bridge crosses a rocky gap.
The ground here is stiff with frost.
Tall cliffs cast long shadows over the path.
The sound of distant stones clattering echoes through the mountains.
A rock breaks loose as you steady yourself while climbing.
A strong mountain wind tugs at your cloak.
The narrow path bends sharply around a cliff face.
Tall stone pillars rise from the mountainside.
Snow gathers along the high ridge ahead.
You glance down into a deep valley far below.
The distant cry of a bird echoes across the cliffs.
You pause briefly on a wide shelf of stone.

The path passes through a narrow natural tunnel.
You climb high enough to see clouds drifting below the peaks.

Water trickles slowly down the cliff face.

You pause briefly to admire the vast mountain view.

You scramble up a rough rocky section.
